tasks.question: Find the most critical subsystem
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 85%

**Core** is the most critical subsystem (centrality-based analysis). Risk score: 100/100. Issues: 6 circular dependencies, 200 dead modules, 33 high-severity smells. 

Related: High-traffic: run, High-traffic: packages/common/constants.ts, High-traffic: packages/common/index.ts

tasks.question: List business capabilities
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 90%

12 capabilities:
• **HTTP Framework & Middleware** — Provides HTTP server, routing pipeline, middleware chain, and request/response handling.
• **Background Jobs & Queues** — Schedules and runs asynchronous, deferred, or heavy work.
• **Data Layer & Persistence** — Manages database access, ORM, migrations, schemas, and repositories.
• **API & Routing** — Exposes HTTP and RPC endp
